mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tag (id, name, tag_type, is_builtin, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{tagId}, #{name}, #{tagType}, #{isBuiltIn}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.select: SELECT id, name, tag_type, is_builtin, create_time, update_time FROM tag ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT id, name, tag_type, is_builtin, create_time, update_time FROM tag WHERE tag_type = #{tagType} ORDER BY create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO model_tag (id, model_id, tag_id, create_time) VALUES (#{id}, #{modelId}, #{tagId}, NOW())
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM model_tag WHERE model_id = #{modelId} AND tag_id = #{tagId}
mapper.select: SELECT t.id, t.name, t.tag_type, t.is_builtin, t.create_time, t.update_time FROM tag t INNER JOIN model_tag mt ON t.id = mt.tag_id WHERE mt.model_id = #{modelId} ORDER BY t.create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO model_type_tag (id, type_id, tag_id, create_time) VALUES (#{id}, #{typeId}, #{tagId}, NOW())
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM model_type_tag WHERE type_id = #{typeId} AND tag_id = #{tagId}
mapper.select: SELECT t.id, t.name, t.tag_type, t.is_builtin, t.create_time, t.update_time FROM tag t INNER JOIN model_type_tag mtt ON t.id = mtt.tag_id WHERE mtt.type_id = #{typeId} ORDER BY t.create_time DESC
